creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Created attachment 248349
patch to ports tree, bringing openvpn-devel to 91b057a2b5b4

It's time again to bump the openvpn-devel port to a newer upstream version - quite a bit of code polishing, new unit tests, SSL library compat, and especially one bugfix related to OpenVPN servers running on FreeBSD 14 + DCO (if_ovpn) where peer statistics would not be reported reliably.
